title: Phone field on dynamic mapping (monday app)

posts.author: sseffa (Sefa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I need to send a phone number in an automation integration, but the phone format is not specified in the document, can you help me with this?

Apps Framework

Dynamic mapping

Let users map data between monday.com items to other objects, with ease!

It doesn’t work when I send it to the existing API.

           {
                "phone": "1242279452",
                "countryShortName": "US"
            }

Again, just giving the phone was not the solution.

         {
             "1242279452"
         }

thanks.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @sseffa,

The phone column is not a supported column type for dynamic mapping.

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: sseffa (Sefa)
posts.cookedHtml: How do I send the country code and phone number together in this case?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @sseffa,

I am not sure I understand the question. The phone column is not supported for dynamic mapping. There is no way for you to use it there.
